titleStmt.title: SII 11.120: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 120. (B.K. No. 214 of 1926-27.) YERIBYĀTĒRI, ROṆ TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A STONE SET UP IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF RĀMALIṄGA.

summary.p: This much damaged inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalla-Permāḍidēva (Vikramāditya VI). It refers to a subordinate who belonged to the [Pāpakalla-kula] and records a gift to the god of Bēlēṟa Jōgēśvarada Mūlasthāna and to the god Bōḷēśvara. It mentions Chāvuṇḍa-Gāvuṇḍa, Jōma-Gāvuṇḍa, Jōga-Gāvuṇḍa and Jakkeyabe.

The record is dated Śaka 968, Pārthiva, Paushya, śu. [2], Sunday, Uttarāyaṇasaṅkramaṇa. In Pārthiva, the saṅkramaṇa fell not on Sunday but on Tuesday (= December 24, A.D. 1045). But in the previous year, i.e., Tāraṇa, it fell on Sunday, Pausha, śu. 1 = Sunday, December 23, 1044 A.D. The latter appears to be the more probable date of the record.

Since the date falls during the first year of the reign of Traiḷōkyamalla Sōmēśvara I, the father of Vikramāditya VI, it is not possible to account for the imperial titles applied to the latter as early as A.D. 1044.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
damaged
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē sa
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cā
ḷukyābharaṇa śrīmattribhuvanamalla permmāḍidēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhi vṛddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ sa
luttamire mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ vidva
jjanābhivṛddhi pāpakallakuḷakamaḷa
nma
hāpracaṇḍa
jana
masvā tri
bhuvanamalla su
khadinā
Lines 13-22 Are damaged And worn Out
sisenisutti
yoḷillivijaya
Āvīrāgraṇige menisi negardda cā
sītegarundhatige kubhri
nikarama
nālku mukhya gētaṇa
kānana
siṁgaṁ ttene sumā
kōpānvitacitta
śauryyōnnatiyaṁ dhātrī
taḷaṁ baṇnise neṟe meṟedaṁ mahō
ttuṁga nisida siṁgaṁgidiriṭṭu badukuva nararoḷarē © grārāti sandōhamaṁ
vi ge raudrāhavaraṁgabhūmiyo datigu
ṇōdārateyuṁ podaḷda calamuṁ siṁgaṁge © ḷikeyoḷ patibra
tadoḷagānārige vānnārige tāne migilā rājaya ccēdakuṭhārāyudha rgu
ṇōttama narhatpādārādhaka ramaḷa haranētratra yamī
jagattrayaṁ mahāśaktitrayaṁ puṭṭuvaṁti ṁ maḻayaśa cāvuṇḍagāvuṇḍanavara dēvaṁ
nittu maṟevaṁ śrījōmanaṁbī mahātmara traya suta puṭṭidar ©
kṣameyo ḷkuṁbhiniyaṁ gabhīrateyo ḷaṁbhōrāsiyaṁ vārppinoḷka
ḻpavṛkṣama nītaṁ neṟe pōlvaneṁ danudinaṁ vyāvarṇnikuṁ viśva sadgu ṇōttamanana cāvuṇḍagāvuṇḍanaṁ ©
jinadharmmapratipāḷanaṁ jinakaḷāḷāpaṁ jinābhyaṁjanaṁ jina navadanaṁ jinamahāstōtraṁ jinatkīrttiyaṁ jinalīlābhiṣa
jināṁghṛkamaḷārādhyaka raṁjisidaṁ dharācakradoḷ © daye dhātrīkhyāta mā
naṁ mahimeya māytādaraṁ ninnoḻu dadinoda vagurvvāytī dānaṁ
bāppakṣayamāyte yāytunnatiya . palarggāśrayamāytēṁ dhanya
jommanurvvīlalāmaṁ © Enisiṟdā cāvuṇḍagāvuṇḍana putraṁ
manōraṁjanaṁ vidviṣadbhaṁjana di jagaṁ kīrttane gāvuṇḍana
maḷayaśa © ka © Iṁtese vaṟi
yade tāḷdidana māḷiyaṁdadi
tā paurajarinte darārenuta
nadaṁ taḷedesediḻda jōgagā
tāntepati guṇōdāre nōnta jōgagāvuṇḍaṁ jakkeyabe
dharmapra prakaṭisalendu © tāḷdīgaṁge viḷāsōnnati
sanmaṁdirada diḻda bhāviya vanatyutsavadiṁde nirmmisidanīnī
© svasti saka varṣa 968 neya pā
rtthiva saṁvatsarada pauṣya su 2 Ādityavāra Uttarāyana saṁkra
śubhatithiyoḷu paṭṭakeṟeya maṭhada pratibaddhada bēlēṟa jōgēśvarada mūlasthānada
maneyaṁ nāyimmarasa tarugāvuṇḍanuṁ sarvvanamaśyaṁ sarvva
kōloḷu biṭṭa mattaru bhōḷēśvaradēvarigā kōlalu biṭṭa mattaru Āṟu © Iṁtī
laya gāvuṇḍugaḷuṁ pratipāḷisuvarintidaṁ svadharmmadiṁrakṣisidavargge vāA few lines at the end are broken
Digital edition of SII 11.120 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
